questions.q: On May 5, 2026, which major e-commerce platform announced it was reviewing a $56 billion 'unsolicited' acquisition offer from GameStop?
Which satellite internet provider slashed the monthly price of its US Residential plan to $29 for the first three months, according to a May 5, 2026 announcement?
What new software platform did IBM announce the general availability of on May 5, 2026, designed to help organizations build AI-ready sovereign environments?
